title: Jamaican Beef Bake
description: A hearty, flavorful beef dish with a rich Jamaican twist. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the beef over medium-high heat until browned. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, cook the onion, bell pepper, and garlic until the vegetables are tender.
Add the allspice, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, butter, and sour cream (if using).
Add the cooked beef back into the bowl and mix well to coat with the flour mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the beef is cooked through and the top is golden brown.
